title: Table extraction golden record
description: One labeled table from an RFP source document. Used as ground truth for HWP/Upstage parser comparison (issue #728, PR-A0). One JSONL line = one table.

source_path.description: Path to the source document the table was extracted from.

page.description: 1-indexed source page. Null when the parser does not expose page mappings (pyhwp event stream).

rows.description: Declared row count from the parser.

cols.description: Declared column count from the parser.

caption.description: Caption text immediately preceding the table (e.g., '표 3.1 평가 배점'). Null in dumped drafts; filled by the labeler.

table_kind.description: Semantic table category. Null in dumped drafts; filled by the labeler. Used by axis #2 of the table-handling plan to drive per-kind chunking policy.

cells.description: Flat list of cells preserving HWP-native row/col coordinates and span info.

extractor.description: Identifier of the extractor that produced this draft (e.g., 'pyhwp_native_tables', 'upstage_document_parser').

notes.description: Free-form labeler notes. Null in dumped drafts.
